description:
Description :

Widely used in family weighing, luggage weighing, vegetable weighing fish weighing, animal and other possible weighing. It's popular in travellling and outdoor activities. It's also a good present/gift for friends/relatives.

Features:

  • simple one touch operation
  • Durable surface and wipe clean
  • Highly accurate strain guage syste
  • high presion stain gauge sensors system
  • stainless steel shell and hardware,with strong strap
  • Digital luggage scale is a useful and popular tool for weighing from 10g~50KG
  • The scale has unique appearance and compact size.
  • It is with a large LCD display screen and Data hold function
  • Helps avoid charges for overweight luggage

variants.name: Selling T scale portable portable electronic baggage scale 50kg outdoor travel small scale 50KG 10G
